notes: Current main is v1.9.2. Do NOT re-propose: cosmetic Object.assign/{} (PR #2 declined). Issues #10 and #12/#13: CI caching and Dependabot config PRs blocked by GitHub Actions .github/ permission. Issue #1: auth-failure, expires May 1. PR #14 (BEGINS_WITH/CONTAINS) rebased onto v1.9.2 on 2026-04-28. PR #19: docs README rewrite. New PRs this run: test (hyphenated attr filter expressions) and feat (getItemsPage cursor pagination). getItemsPage implemented: uses single QueryCommand, returns PageResult<T> with base64-encoded ExclusiveStartKey cursor, works for direct and GSI queries.
